metadata.name: SWE-bench Lite - PowerShell Edition
metadata.description: Benchmark tasks for evaluating AI agent task completion capabilities

tasks.name: File Creation and Content Writing
tasks.description: Create a text file with specific content
tasks.script: Set-Content -Path '.\test-output.txt' -Value 'Hello from Agent Benchmark' -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host 'File created successfully'

tasks.description: Parse JSON and extract specific field

tasks.name: Directory Listing and Filtering
tasks.description: List files with specific extension and count them

tasks.name: Date and Time Calculation
tasks.description: Calculate days until end of year
tasks.script: $now = Get-Date; $endOfYear = Get-Date -Date '12/31/2026'; $days = ($endOfYear - $now).Days; Write-Host "Days until end of 2026: $days"

tasks.name: CSV Data Generation
tasks.description: Create CSV file with structured data

tasks.description: Complete data pipeline: load, transform, aggregate, output

tasks.description: Define reusable function and test it
